title: Emerging Tech Roles Power Nigeria’s Entry Into Global AI Economy
description: As artificial intelligence (AI) continues to reshape global industries, Nigeria is quietly witnessing the rise of a new workforce, one that operates behind the scenes of machine learning systems yet plays a critical role in powering the digital economy. From data annotators and prompt engineers to AI ethicists and model trainers, emerging tech roles are [...]

title: NHRC issues notices over alleged DPDP Act violations by AI, social media, EdTech platforms
description: New Delhi, March 25, 2026 The National Human Rights Commission (NHRC) has taken cognisance of alleged violations of the Digital Personal Data Protection (DPDP) Act, particularly regarding the absence of mechanisms to track children’s data transfers and inadequate grievance redressal systems across major digital platforms. A bench led by NHRC member Priyank Kanoongo initiated action [...] The post NHRC issues notices over alleged DPDP Act violations by AI, social media, EdTech platforms appeared first on Yes Punjab News .

title: Epic Games Layoffs Affect 1,000 Staff, Company Denies AI Role in Cuts
description: Epic Games is restructuring, with over 1,000 layoffs amid financial strain and legal battles with Apple and Google. The company is refocusing on core experiences and future growth, affecting Fortnite and the gaming industry.

title: Palladyne AI Conference: CEO Says Pentagon Priorities Shift to Attritable, Swarming Autonomy
description: A panel of executives from four defense- and space-focused companies described what they see as near-term U.S. military priorities and the technologies and industrial capacity needed to meet them, emphasizing “scale,” autonomy, and production readiness as modern warfare evolves. Shift toward attritable systems and autonomy Benjamin Wolff, Chief Executive Officer of Palladyne AI (NASDAQ:PDYN), said [...]
